description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating, bordered by a small landscaped area with a tree and shrubs. Large windows dominate the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior, while a balcony on the upper floor provides additional outdoor space. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored materials, likely wood or composite panels, giving the house a contemporary appearance. The property is surrounded by a paved area and includes several decorative trees, enhancing its urban curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, and landscaped greenery, featuring a clean, rectangular design and contemporary materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, wooden deck with seating, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, solid wall with minimal windows, and the extension of the deck and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, upper balcony, and additional trees, with less visible entry features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, upper balcony, and a mix of trees, with the deck partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, steps leading to a wooden deck, and minimalistic landscaping
